name: feature_002_config_override_layer
description: Introduce an override config source with the highest precedence above defaults, file config, and environment values.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this is small feature work because it adds a new override layer and precedence rule rather than repairing a broken existing source. It is not a disguised bug fix because defaults, base files, and env overrides already behave as designed before the new layer is introduced.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the solver must reason across defaults, file loading, environment overrides, and CLI plumbing while keeping precedence deterministic.
